title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A podcast discussion examining warning signs in the AI boom, including rising token consumption costs, the low percentage of tokens spent on shipped products, and questions about whether investment decisions are being driven by unsustainable "tokenmaxxing." Topics also cover Anthropic's valuation milestone, AI-powered trading applications, and ethical concerns around AI data collection.
